name: Wild Island Quest
description: Explore, gather, and build your way to success in Wild Island Quest! Start on a remote island where every resource counts chop trees for wood, mine rocks for stone, and unlock powerful tools and abilities. Complete missions by crafting useful items like berry jam, earning coins to upgrade your gear and expand your skills. Cut plants to rescue helpful companions who will assist you in every task, making your journey easier and faster. Venture to new islands, face fresh challenges, and keep growing stronger. Easy to play yet deeply rewarding how far can your island adventure go?
instructions: Chop trees to collect wood Mine rocks to gather stone Deposit resources to unlock tools Use tools to access new materials Complete missions Earn coins and buy upgrades Travel to new islands and explore
